---
name: 体验反馈 / User Feedback
about: 分享你的使用感受、建议或困惑 / Share your experience, suggestions or confusion
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

<table>
<tr>
<th width="50%">中文</th>
<th width="50%">English</th>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 你是谁？
（新用户 / 老用户 / 开发者 / 好奇路过…… 随便说）

</td>
<td>

## Who are you?
(New user / returning user / developer / just curious — anything goes)

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 你在哪个端体验的？
- [ ] 主 App（Web / iOS / Android）
- [ ] 管理后台
- [ ] 桌面端

</td>
<td>

## Which client did you use?
- [ ] Main App (Web / iOS / Android)
- [ ] Admin panel
- [ ] Desktop app

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 哪里让你眼前一亮？
（喜欢的功能、细节、交互）

</td>
<td>

## What delighted you?
(Features, details, or interactions you liked)

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 哪里让你困惑或不爽？
（看不懂、点不到、慢、太多步骤……）

</td>
<td>

## What confused or frustrated you?
(Unclear UI, unreachable buttons, slow, too many steps…)

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 你希望我们做什么？
（一句话也行）

</td>
<td>

## What would you like us to do?
(One line is fine)

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

## 截图 / 录屏（可选）

</td>
<td>

## Screenshots / recordings (optional)

</td>
</tr>

</table>

---

> 🙌 感谢你花时间反馈。新用户愿意开口 = 愿意留下来，我们会认真读每一条。
> 🙌 Thanks for taking the time. Every piece of feedback is read carefully.
